rationale.D1: Confirmed: all mechanism subsystems (LeftFlywheel, LeftHood, LeftTurret, etc.) directly own TalonFX motors with no IO interface layer; swerve is CTRE-generated CommandSwerveDrivetrain — vendored abstraction on drive, hardware-welded mechanisms everywhere else.
rationale.D2: Confirmed: no Superstructure class, no WantedState/SystemState enums, no FSM coordinator — shot commands (GeneralShot, PointAtHub) are parallel command groups wiring subsystems together, which is command composition only.
rationale.D3: Confirmed: simulationPeriodic() is an empty stub in Robot.java; CommandSwerveDrivetrain runs a CTRE notifier sim loop for the drivetrain but no mechanism physics (ElevatorSim/FlywheelSim/etc.) exist anywhere.
rationale.D4: Confirmed: no src/test directory and no test files present; JUnit 5 is declared in build.gradle dependencies but no tests have been written.
rationale.D5: Confirmed: SmartDashboard.put* used extensively in Robot.java and subsystems; Telemetry.java publishes drivetrain state via structured NetworkTables (StructPublisher) and CTRE SignalLogger writes to log files — above mere dashboard scattered puts but not a full structured logging framework.
rationale.D6: Confirmed: AutoBuilder fully configured in CommandSwerveDrivetrain, 34 path files and 18 auto files in deploy/pathplanner, named commands registered in RobotContainer, SendableChooser for auto selection — no Choreo files or repulsor planning.
rationale.D7: Confirmed: dual Limelight cameras (limelight-br, limelight-bl) feed getBotPoseEstimate_wpiBlue into addVisionMeasurement with speed-scaled std-devs and tag count/distance rejection logic in Robot.java robotPeriodic — multi-camera fused, filtered estimation.
rationale.D8: Confirmed: CLAUDE.md serves as a real project doc with build/architecture/convention documentation, styleguide-frc4607.xml (365 lines) enforces Google Java Style per CLAUDE.md, Constants/Calibrations split is principled — no CI workflows, no separate library repo.
